replacements.description: Main Forge package rename (must be LAST of package renames)
Remove bus=FORGE from @EventBusSubscriber (FORGE is default in NeoForge)
Remove bus=FORGE when it appears first in @EventBusSubscriber
RegistryObject<T> -> DeferredHolder<T, T> (2 type params required)
Forge tag -> common tag namespace (glass renamed to glass_blocks)
Forge tag -> common tag namespace (glass/ -> glass_blocks/)
Forge tag -> common tag namespace (cobblestone -> cobblestones)
Forge tag -> common tag namespace (sand -> sands)
Forge tag -> common tag namespace (stone -> stones)
Forge tag -> common tag namespace (leather -> leathers)
Forge tag -> common tag namespace (string -> strings)
Loot context param set rename: KILLER -> ATTACKER
ForgeRegistries import -> BuiltInRegistries + Registries + NeoForgeRegistries imports
DeferredHolder passed to accept() needs .get() — DeferredHolder is not ItemLike
Fix pathfinder import (already correct after rename)
Holder.get() -> Holder.value() for biome temperature access
Registry.getValue() -> Registry.get() (renamed in 1.21, only for registry instances)
Consumer<RecipeOutput> -> RecipeOutput (1.21 data gen API change)
Crafting conditions package moved: common.crafting.conditions -> common.conditions (1.21)
